title: GINGER REVEAL — signed by Ginger from the magic forest

Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — BOTH gently holding the rescue-note open between her thumbs and fingers. The bottom corner of the back of the paper has handwritten English text reading 'GINGER' followed by a tiny pawprint stamp, clearly visible. @eva-beach already kneeling on the LEFT pressed in close beside Sara, both knees softly on the wet sand, leaning in over the paper with eyes huge. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — BOTH softly clasped under her chin in cute wonder pose, NEITHER touching the note. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara's eyes go HUGE with cheerful wonder-recognition — pure happy shock-recognition, mouth open in a soft 'O'. Sara (small breathy gasp, soft and cheerful): "...Ginger? GINGER!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva (jaw gently dropped, eyes shining): "From the magic forest? The pink-tree fox?!" Sara (nodding slowly, holding the note up gently): "It's HER. It's REALLY her." Both girls share a warm awe-look together. Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance throughout. Keep all character bodies stable, consistent in scale, and locked to the same outfit and hairstyle from second 0 through the final second. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both holding the note. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Both girls stay kneeling with knees softly on the wet sand throughout — no jumping, no leaping. The wet sand stays plain wet sand — no marks, no red, no debris.
